summary: feedback cursor advances to total_len even when the tail ends mid-line; user feedback silently dropped.
failure_scenario: User writes a multi-KB feedback entry; check_interventions polls mid-flush, partial trailing line fails serde parse, cursor still advances past those bytes — never re-read.

summary: recover_orphan_tasks rewrites state.json to Failed but never updates the sqlite tasks.state column — DB/disk diverge.
failure_scenario: App crashes mid-task. Recovery sets disk state=Failed; list_tasks still shows R1_Executing from sqlite; UI shows wrong state forever.

summary: reset_task clears feedback.cursor but not feedback.jsonl — stale guidance replayed on next run.
failure_scenario: Pause → feedback → abort → reset → start. Next R1 Decider's user_message contaminated with old aborted-run feedback.

summary: recover_orphan_tasks assumes single-process invariant; two Flow instances race and clobber each other.
failure_scenario: User double-clicks app icon during R2_Executing. Instance B marks state.json=Failed; Instance A's next persist overwrites it. UI flickers.

summary: parse_review_verdict can't handle UTF-16 BOM files; reports 'review file not found' instead of encoding issue.
failure_scenario: PowerShell Out-File writes UTF-16-BOM by default; review.md parse fails; FSM routes to next round under wrong reason.

summary: retry.flag is unconditionally removed before checking state; in R*Deciding the match yields None and the signal is silently lost.
failure_scenario: User clicks Retry during R1_Deciding. Flag deleted, no transition, no log — user must click again after Deciding completes.

summary: reset_task refuses unknown state values; stale/corrupt state.json is unrescuable until app restart.
failure_scenario: State.json truncated mid-write to 'R1_Exec'. Reset returns '任务正在运行中' forever; only restart fixes.

summary: run_role clears last_error before persist_state, so the R{n} FAIL reason is wiped the moment R{n+1} Deciding begins.
failure_scenario: R1 reviewer FAIL: 'missing tests'. R2_Deciding begins, last_error→None; persist writes error=null; UI loses the 'why' between rounds.

summary: Abort path exits loop without removing a concurrently-written retry.flag — stale signal persists to next run.
failure_scenario: Abort then Retry quickly. abort branch fires first; retry.flag remains on disk; consumed at next R1_Deciding (None branch) and silently swallowed.

summary: reset_task races with orchestrator's persist_state writer — Pending write can be clobbered.
failure_scenario: User Resets during orchestrator cleanup. Reset writes Pending; orchestrator writes Failed 50ms later. Wrong terminal state shown until reload.
